# Safdar Ali

> Safdar Ali is a developer, creator, and YouTuber based in Bengaluru, India. Personal portfolio at safdarali.in — projects, technical articles, skills, and contact. Built with Next.js.

## About

Safdar Ali is a frontend-focused software developer and content creator from Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. He builds web applications with Next.js and React, publishes tutorials on YouTube (Safdar Ali Coding), and writes technical articles on safdarali.in.

- Frontend developer — Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- YouTuber — 70+ React and Next.js tutorials (Hindi-English mix)
- Based in Bengaluru, India (IST)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://safdarali.in): Overview — who Safdar is, featured projects, articles, contact
- [About](https://safdarali.in/about): Background, photos, story, Safdar Ali Coding YouTube section
- [Skills](https://safdarali.in/skills): Tech stack and tools used day to day
- [Projects](https://safdarali.in/projects): Shipped work — case studies, stack, live demo links
- [Blog](https://safdarali.in/blog): Native articles on safdarali.in plus links to DEV and Medium
- [Contact](https://safdarali.in/contact): Contact form and social profiles

## Skills & expertise

- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
- **Backend**: Node.js, REST APIs (Prisma/PostgreSQL on select projects)
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, Vercel, VS Code
- **Content**: YouTube (Safdar Ali Coding), technical writing, screen recording

## YouTube

Channel: **Safdar Ali Coding** — https://www.youtube.com/@safdarali_

- React, Next.js, TypeScript tutorials for developers in India and worldwide
- On-site hub: https://safdarali.in/about#safdar-ali-youtube
- Learning path article: https://safdarali.in/blog/learn-react-nextjs-india-resources-2026
